trans-unit.note: {0} is the fully qualified test name.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable GitHub Actions failure annotations ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable GitHub Actions failure annotations ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the assembly name, {1} is the target framework moniker.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable per-assembly log groups ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable per-assembly log groups ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: Invalid value '{0}'. Valid values are 'on' and 'off'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid value '{0}'. Valid values are 'on' and 'off'.

trans-unit.source: The test failed without providing a failure message.
trans-unit.target: The test failed without providing a failure message.

trans-unit.source: Enable GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable GitHub Actions report generator to emit workflow commands so test runs produce a first-class experience on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: Enable or disable writing a markdown job summary to the GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY file ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.
trans-unit.target: Enable or disable writing a markdown job summary to the GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY file ('on' or 'off'). Defaults to 'on' when running on GitHub Actions.

trans-unit.source: Failed to write the GitHub Actions job summary to '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.target: Failed to write the GitHub Actions job summary to '{0}': {1}
trans-unit.note: {0} is the file path, {1} is the error message.
